summary: FY Label Changes Testing Complete. All 'KMS' user-facing labels have been replaced with 'FY' across frontend and backend. Fixed 4 remaining 'KMS' references in backend private_trading.py and 3 in frontend (BalanceSheet.jsx, ExcelImport.jsx, MillingTracker.jsx). Backend APIs work correctly with kms_year param (internal field unchanged). FY year logic correctly shows 2025-2026 for March 2026.

VERIFIED: Mill Entries section shows 'FY:' in header
VERIFIED: Dashboard target form shows 'FY Year' label
VERIFIED: Payments page shows 'FY Year / Season' label
VERIFIED: Backend APIs work with kms_year param (internal field unchanged)
VERIFIED: FY year logic uses April-March (March 2026 shows 2025-2026)
VERIFIED: No 'KMS' user-facing text in main UI tabs
FIXED: 4 'KMS' references in backend/routes/private_trading.py (PDF/Excel export titles)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All FY labels verified, no KMS user-facing text found)
